title: Romantic Aerated Middle Eastern Pita Bread Shawarma
description: Airy, flavorful, and romantic, this Middle Eastern pita bread shawarma features spherified ingredients and a low-calorie twist.

ingredients.name: Spherified feta cheese
ingredients.notes: Use a sodium alginate and calcium chloride solution to spherify the feta cheese.

ingredients.name: Grilled chicken breast
ingredients.notes: Marinate the chicken in a mixture of olive oil, lemon juice, and Middle Eastern spices before grilling.

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Marinate the chicken breast in a mixture of olive oil, lemon juice, and Middle Eastern spices for at least 30 minutes.
Grill the chicken breast until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, toast the pine nuts in a dry pan until fragrant.
Chop the parsley and mint leaves and set aside.
Spherify the feta cheese using a sodium alginate and calcium chloride solution.
Roast the red bell pepper and eggplant in the oven until tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Grill the pita bread until slightly charred, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Assemble the shawarma by slicing the grilled chicken, pita bread, roasted red bell pepper, and roasted eggplant into thin strips.
Drizzle with lemon-tahini sauce, sprinkle with toasted pine nuts, and garnish with spherified feta cheese, parsley, and mint leaves.
